arts.ttl: “If you want to run away like Leeds” – Brescia fans attack Cellino, and take advantage of his 17 superstition
arts.sum: Leeds United when an ongoing drama when Massimo Cellino owned the club between 2014 and 2017. The Whites failed to impress on the pitch when Cellino was the owner at Elland Road. He eventually sold his stake in Leeds to his compatriot, Andrea Radrizzani, in 2017, and the club ended up back in the Premier The post “If you want to run away like Leeds” – Brescia fans attack Cellino, and take advantage of his 17 superstition appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Max Wöber: New Leeds promotion clause emerges
arts.sum: Leeds United centre-back Max Wöber has been heavily linked with a move to Red Bull Salzburg, but a clause in his contract could keep him at Elland Road. Journalist reveals Max Wöber Leeds clause that could ruin chances of Red Bull Salzburg return

arts.ttl: Reporter offers fresh insight on future of Leeds United man amid European transfer links
arts.sum: Leeds United defender Max Wober could lean towards staying at Elland Road despite links with a move away,… The post Reporter offers fresh insight on future of Leeds United man amid European transfer links appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Jayden Bogle's lay-off and Sam Greenwood's future on Daniel Farke's Leeds United agenda
arts.sum: Much like a fortnight ago, Leeds will head to Lancashire for a Saturday lunchtime kick-off on the back of two matches in the preceding week. Daniel Farke faces the media on Friday afternoon for his pre-match press conference.

arts.ttl: Huge blow for Leeds United’s promotion rivals as “Jack Clarke regen” ruled out for months
arts.sum: Leeds United’s promotion rivals Sunderland have been hit with another major attacking injury blow this week, with emerging talent Tommy Watson out for at least two months. The latest off the conveyor belt of talent inn the North East has been 18-year-old Tommy Watson, whose brace last weekend secured Sunderland’s first win in seven games, described by the NTT20 podcast host Ali Maxwell as “the closest ‘regen’ of Jack Clarke you could possibly imagine” :

arts.ttl: Leeds United snub explained as Ethan Ampadu leapfrogs into XI
arts.sum: Aerial prowess, defensive steel, strength, leadership and battle-hardened Championship experience saw Ethan Ampadu leapfrog into Leeds United’s right-back slot on Tuesday. Ampadu has played on the right of a back three for Leeds on the rare occasions Farke has deployed that formation, but it was unusual to see him as an out-and-out full-back.

arts.ttl: Leeds United diehards deliver damning Patrick Bamford verdict as transfer plan suggested
arts.sum: Almost 1,500 supporters recently took part in a LeedsLive transfer poll and we asked the question which players United should try the most to keep and only seven per cent voted for Bamford, Gelhardt and highly-rated youngster Sam Chambers. United are reportedly interested in beefing up their attack next month, with Maccabi Tel Aviv striker Dor Turgeman among the players to be linked in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Compared: Leeds, Sheff Utd, Burnley, Sunderland fixture difficulty
arts.sum: After that, Leeds return home to face Oxford United, one of only two sides that are yet to taste victory on their travels – then two away games come after Christmas Day, at Stoke City on Boxing Day evening, then to Derby County. arts.ttl: Preview: Preston North End vs. Leeds United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Preston North End and Leeds United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Leeds Want to Sign Star With ‘Magic in his Boots’ From Champions League Club
arts.sum: Leeds United have joined a host of English clubs in the race to sign in-form Aston Villa forward Louie Barry in the January transfer window.
